ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heater_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heater model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name or code of the heater model */,
  "voltage" INTEGER /* Nominal voltage of the heater */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the heater (e.g., 1 Phase, 3 Phase) */,
  "watts" INTEGER /* Power rating of the heater in watts */,
  "heater_tubes" INTEGER /* Number of heater tubes */,
  "mounting_flange_width_in" REAL /* Mounting flange width in inches */,
  "mounting_flange_width_mm" REAL /* Mounting flange width in millimeters */,
  "approx_weight_lb" REAL /* Approximate weight of the heater in pounds */,
  "approx_weight_kg" REAL /* Approximate weight of the heater in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heater model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "warranty_period_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the heater */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range of the heater */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the construction of the heater */,
  "safety_certifications" TEXT /* Safety certifications the heater has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse in units */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse in units */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "supplied_models" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of models supplied by the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heater model */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the heater model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the specific inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES heater_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer operates in */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of models purchased by the customer */,
  "preferred_delivery_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred delivery method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales order */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heater model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the heater model ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the heater model */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total amount for the line item */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the specific item */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sales_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES heater_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heater model */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance or service */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance service */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the heater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES heater_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the technician */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the technician has */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the technician (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who opened the ticket */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heater model related to the ticket */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue or inquiry */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned to the ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the ticket */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES heater_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
